CO20 Project Area

• 27 counties • 15,678 square miles • 17,483 tiles (5,000' by 5,000') • Nadir Orthoimagery AOI: • Wilmington • Greenville • 18 major bridges • Coordination with Military Operations:

Orthoimagery Deliverables – 2020 and beyond

• Mid-November Delivery Timeline to County PSAP and GIS

• Full Resolution TIFF Tiles (5000’ by 5000’) – • 400mb per tile • **4-Band (RGBIR)**

• 20:1 Compressed MrSID Tiles (5000’ by 5000’) – • Generation 4 MrSID • 4-Band RGBIR

• 50:1 Compressed MrSID Mosaic Single File (County 7-mile Rectangle) • 3-Band RGB • 3-Band False-color IR

• NC OneMap Image Services • Single year service – 4-Band RGBIR • Orthoimagery_latest – TBD • Orthoimagery_all – TBD
